headline: Dominion Energy, Apple And A Health Care Stock: CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: On CNBC's Halftime Report Final Trades, Bill Baruch highlights Eli Lilly's great earnings. Dominion Energy and Apple also see positive results.
